retrieved_result: How many feet is one square foot? Loring Chien, former Principal Engineer at Fortune 1000 Company (2002-2016)Answered Oct 20, 2017 · Author has 22.2k answers and 28.2m answer views Originally Answered: How many feet are in a square foot? Feet are a linear measure. Square feet are a area measure. They cannot be compared or converted.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses measurement units (feet vs square feet) and has no relation to database queries or optimization.
